description.value: Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.

information.notes:
Generic A/Vs (Multipurpose, Super) can be found on page 191 of the RED core rules. The Trauma Team A/V-4 is a Super Aerodyne with two seating upgrades installed and increased HP.

Trauma team will almost always arrive via one of these A/Vs, staying just long enough to retrieve a patient before leaving again in a hurry. The belly-mounted autogun discourages "hostile intervention".

A typical Trauma Team response group is comprised of a pilot, a doctor, a nurse, and 2 security officers. More details can be found on pg 224 of the core rules.

Token and art by Mattew Reger - find him on Instagram at kingof.roses (link).
